name: Lovino Vargas (Romano)
description:
Romano from Hetalia.

Requested by: T0ff33

EDIT 5/2/24: He’s less OOC now that I have clarified that his rude way of speaking exists. I also added an anti-flowery language clause to this and most of my other Hetalia bots.

Creator’s Note: Italian bitchboy my beloved- As always, character definition is based on both canon and fanon information. His attire is based on what I’ve often seen him wear outside of his uniform in fanart.
creator: LizbitTheBear
